title: Dhadkan
subTitle: Anjali and Dev's love story faces a harsh twist when Anjali is forced to marry Ram. Years later, Dev returns to rekindle their romance, only to find that Anjali has grown to love her husband.

title: Samay: When Time Strikes
subTitle: ACP Malvika Chauhan, a widowed mother, is assigned to investigate the murder of a businessman. However, she suspects it to be a serial killer as more murders take place in the city.

title: Saath Naa Chhodenge
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Marshal
subTitle: When a hospital subjects its patients to unethical treatment, one young man stands up against the system and decides to investigate.

title: Karishma Kudrat Ka
subTitle: Vijay lives in a village with his family. He makes an enemy with Lala and a bandit, Bhagad, who devises a plan to throw the former out of the village.

title: Naya Kadam
subTitle: In a village ruled by Madhukar and Jaggu, who deprive the people of education so they can easily oppress them, Ramu manages to educate himself secretly with the help of a school teacher.

title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Eena Meena Deeka
subTitle: A bank robbery mix-up sets the scene for a crackbrained cat-and-mouse game involving a troubled culprit, a fresh-out-of-jail customer and a policeman's feisty daughter.

title: Teri Meherbaniyan
subTitle: Ram, an honest man, falls in love with a woman named Bijli and goes on to help the people of her village. However, the region's corrupt leader, Thakur Vijay Singh, soon begins to plot against him.

title: Avtaar
subTitle: Avtaar leads a happy life with his wife, Radha, and his sons, Chander and Ramesh. However, consumed by their greed and ambitions, Avtaar's sons betray him but he soon reaches new heights of success.

title: Avtaar
subTitle: Avtaar leads a happy life with his wife, Radha, and his sons, Chander and Ramesh. However, consumed by their greed and ambitions, Avtaar's sons betray him but he soon reaches new heights of success.

title: Jaane Jigar
subTitle: Two identical women who hail from different backgrounds fall in love with two best friends, Ravi and Vijay. Misunderstandings arise when Ravi and Vijay believe they are in love with the same girl.

title: Bhagambhag Love
subTitle: Sasirekha is betrothed to an NRI against her wishes and runs away from home on the day of her wedding. However, she meets and falls in love with Anand without knowing his true identity.

title: Josh
subTitle: Set in Vasco, Goa, Max and Prakash are young men who lead two rival groups. Their feud becomes worse when Prakash's brother, Rahul, falls in love with Shirley, Max's twin sister.

title: Jaan Se Pyaara
subTitle: Inspector Jai balances working as a cop with taking care of his mother and a brother with developmental disabilities. But when he arrests a local don, he starts to fear for his family's safety.

title: Katilon Ke Kaatil
subTitle: Traumatised by her murder of her husband and the abduction of her two sons, a woman spends her life looking for her family. Things take a turn when two men arrive at her house with a family heirloom.

title: Police Aur Mujrim
subTitle: After DSP Vishal arrests two thugs, their boss kidnaps the commissioner's daughter. But after Vishal rescues the girl and jails the thugs, they return to hurt Vishal and the commissioner's families.

title: Main Tera Dushman
subTitle: When a Forest Officer, Kishan Srivastav, hinders the criminal activities of Thakur Dayalu, he is framed for murder and sent to jail. Later, Kishan escapes prison and tries to clear his name.

title: Durga IPS
subTitle: Police officer Chennamma takes on the task of eliminating a gangster and his evil son in order to save society from their tyranny.

title: Naya Din Nai Raat
subTitle: Sushma escapes from her arranged marriage and embarks on an adventure that changes her life forever. Along the way, she encounters several men, each embodying different aspects of human life.

title: Naya Din Nai Raat
subTitle: Sushma escapes from her arranged marriage and embarks on an adventure that changes her life forever. Along the way, she encounters several men, each embodying different aspects of human life.

title: Barood Ka Pahaad
subTitle: An engineering student becomes embroiled in a conflict with a corrupt politician and his brother while protecting the woman he loves.

title: Apartment
subTitle: Preeti, an air hostess, throws her unfaithful boyfriend out of her apartment. However, trouble brews when she starts sharing the house with Neha, a girl with many secrets.

title: Pighalta Aasman
subTitle: Arti, a businesswoman from Delhi, falls in love with Suraj, during her trip to settle a property dispute in Kashmir. However, things become complicated when Anuradha, her friend, also falls for him.

title: 16 December
subTitle: Four IRS officers race against the clock to disarm the nuclear bomb planted by a rebel Pakistani terrorist in New Delhi.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Platform
subTitle: Vikram and Raju are brothers who work in a restaurant. When a conniving person frames Vikram in a murder case and separates them, circumstances lead Raju to a life of crime.

title: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor
subTitle: A rich girl, Shalini, falls in love with an orphan, Arun, after he performs the poems she wrote using a pen name. However, things take a tragic turn when Arun marries the principal's daughter, Meena.

title: Hindustani Yoddha
subTitle: A young orphan girl suffers at the hands of an evil woman who envies her melodious voice. When she loses hope, her music teacher narrates the story of a heroic man to inspire her.
